page: Microsoft Azure M64ms_v2 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MSMediumMemoryv2 server family. Powered by an x86_64 Intel processor, this server provides 64 dedicated vCPUs and a massive memory allocation of 1792.0 GB. This configuration yields a high resource density of 28.0 GB of RAM per core, making it suitable for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. The virtual machine runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

The M64ms_v2 is Premium Storage capable, allowing users to attach high-performance external storage volumes, though it does not include any local storage. There are no integrated GPUs, and the instance does not come with complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This design prioritizes massive memory capacity and dedicated compute resources over local disk space or hardware acceleration.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the M64ms_v2 represents a high-resource-density tier tailored for workloads where memory capacity is the primary bottleneck. It is designed for large-scale relational databases, in-memory data caches, enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems, and heavy data analytics pipelines that require keeping massive datasets entirely in system memory to avoid disk I/O latency.
description: Microsoft Azure M64ms_v2 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MSMediumMemoryv2 family, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. Built on the x86_64 architecture with an Intel processor, it features 64 dedicated vCPUs and a substantial memory capacity of 1792.0 GB, translating to 28.0 GB of RAM per core. Operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable for attaching high-performance external drives. The server is engineered for workloads requiring massive memory footprints, such as large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and complex data analytics pipelines. By prioritizing memory density over local storage, it offers a specialized resource profile for memory-bound applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M64ms_v2 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 1792.0 GB of RAM. It is designed for memory-intensive workloads and is Premium Storage capable.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring sixty-four dedicated cores and massive memory capacity for demanding in-memory enterprise workloads.

Premium Storage capable for high-performance external volumes
No local storage or integrated GPUs
Optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and ERP systems
